properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL of the application.

properties.name: app.mail.to
properties.description: Primary email recipient for validation notifications.

properties.name: app.rappel.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between automatic reminder emails (default: 1800000 = 30 min).

properties.name: app.data-initializer.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the data initializer on startup.

properties.name: app.storage.b2.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable Backblaze B2 storage.

properties.name: app.storage.b2.presign-duration-minutes
properties.description: Duration in minutes for pre-signed URL validity.

properties.name: app.security.remember-me-key
properties.description: Secret key used to sign remember-me tokens. Override via REMEMBER_ME_KEY env variable in production.
